value.stringValue: Action cancelled. No email has been sent.

assignments.name: Assign_Shift_Start_End_Time_to_Text
assignments.label: Assign Shift Start/End Time to Text

assignments.name: Assign_Shift_Start_End_Time_to_Text_0
assignments.label: Assign Shift Start/End Time to Text

decisions.name: First_Forecasted_Pay_Date_is_blank
decisions.label: First Forecasted Pay Date is blank

Flow.description: PT1-1277 - Add Compass pay cycle text

formulas.name: Rate_Table_Row
formulas.expression: '' + {!Add_Rate_Row.sirenum__Standard_Rate_Name__c} + '' + TEXT({!Add_Rate_Row.sirenum__Day_Type__c})+ '' + {!Add_Rate_Row.sirenum__Start_Hour__c}+ '' + {!Add_Rate_Row.sirenum__End_Hour__c}+ '' + '£'+ TEXT({!Add_Rate_Row.sirenum__Pay_Rate__c})+ '' + '£' + TEXT({!Add_Rate_Row.sirenum__Overtime_Pay_Rate__c})+ ''

formulas.name: Shift_Table_Row
formulas.expression: '<tr><td style="border:1px solid black;">' + {!Shift_Start_Time_Text} + '</th><td style="border:1px solid black;">' + {!Shift_End_Time_text} + '</th></tr>'

Flow.interviewLabel: Screen Flow - Send Candidate Assignment Email {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Screen Flow - Send Candidate Assignment Email

recordLookups.description: Get the most recently created Rate Card page that meets BOTH conditions: - valid for today and - without any conditions (e.g. not candidate or age specific rate page)
recordLookups.name: Get_Rate_Card_Page
recordLookups.label: Get Rate Card Page

recordUpdates.description: Update S-Placement to tick Shift Sent flag
recordUpdates.name: Update_S_Placement
recordUpdates.label: Update S-Placement

recordUpdates.description: Update S-Placement to tick Shift Sent flag
recordUpdates.name: Update_S_Placement_1
recordUpdates.label: Update S-Placement with Error Reason

recordUpdates.description: Update S-Placement to tick Shift Sent flag
recordUpdates.name: Update_S_Placement_1_0
recordUpdates.label: Update Error Reason - No valid shift found

recordUpdates.description: Update S-Placement to tick Shift Sent flag
recordUpdates.name: Update_S_Placement_1_0_0
recordUpdates.label: Update Error Reason - Candidate email missing

fields.name: Error_Message
fields.fieldText: A system error has occurred. No email has been sent. Please inform your system administrator.

fields.name: Error_Message_0
fields.fieldText: There is no valid shift associated to the S-Placement. No email has been sent.

fields.name: Error_Message_0_0
fields.fieldText: Candidate email missing. No email has been sent.

fields.name: Error_Message_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: Assignment email has already been sent. Are you sure that you want to send it again?

fields.name: Error_Message_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: This process will send your candidate an assignment confirmation email confirming their assignment details including shifts and rates.

textTemplates.name: Assignment_Email_Body
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!Get_S_Placement.sirenum__Contact__r.FirstName},

Confirmation of ongoing temporary assignment

Client Name: {!Get_S_Placement.sirenum__Site__r.Name}

Client Address: {!Get_S_Placement.sirenum__Site__r.sirenum__Full_Address__c}

Starting on: {!Get_S_Placement.sirenum__Start_Date__c} as {!Get_S_Placement.sirenum__Job_Role__r.Name}

Notified Health and Safety Risks: {!Get_Job_Role.IP_Notified_Health_Safety_Risks__c}

Special Induction: {!Get_Job_Role.IP_Special_Induction__c}

Uniform Requirements: {!Get_Job_Role.IP_Personal_Protective_Equipment__c}

Job Description:

{!Get_Job_Role.IP_Job_Description__c}

Forecasted first weekly pay date:

{!FirstForecastedPayDate}


Initial hours of work:

{!Shift_Table}

The table below outlines pay rate(s) that are applicable to this assignment. Note that pay rates may vary depending on time and date of the shift and other factors. Should the pay rate applicable to your shifts change, we will confirm accordingly.

{!Compass_Pay_Cycle_Text}

{!Rate_Table}

Additional information can also be obtained from your Key Information Document and Flexible Employee Handbook. If you have any queries regarding your assignment please feel free to contact me.


Yours sincerely

{!Get_S_Placement.IP_Consultant1LookupSplitShare__r.FirstName} {!Get_S_Placement.IP_Consultant1LookupSplitShare__r.LastName}

{!Sender_Phone}

{!Sender_Email}

value.stringValue: Payment for work at Compass will be made weekly in arrears directly into your bank account subject to deduction of tax and national insurance in respect of hours worked in the preceding week. Compass’ working week is Thursday to Wednesday.

<tr> <th style="border: 1px solid black;">Rate Name</th> <th style="border: 1px solid black;">Day Type</th> <th style="border: 1px solid black;">Start Hour</th> <th style="border: 1px solid black;">End Hour</th> <th style="border: 1px solid black;">Pay Rate</th><th style="border: 1px solid black;">Overtime Pay Rate</th></tr>
<tr> <th style="border: 1px solid black;">Start Time</th> <th style="border: 1px solid black;">End Time</th></tr>
